node.text: This year, Shell continued to do what it has done for more than a century: help safely deliver the energy the world relies on to move, work and grow. node.text: Liquefied natural gas (LNG) is helping to meet India’s surging energy demand, fuelling industry and offering a lower-carbon alternative to coal. Join us on a journey from London to Delhi, Gujarat and Mumbai to see how LNG is powering lives and economic progress. Discover more: https://go.shell.com/4potZRy

node.text: Oil remains a fundamental part of our daily lives — powering not just transport, but manufacturing and modern living. 🎙️ Peter Costello, Shell’s President of Upstream, joins The Energy Podcast to explore the evolving role of oil in the energy mix, growing energy demand, and the need to continue investing in its production to help provide the energy the world needs today. 🔗 Watch the full episode: https://go.shell.com/3LL2nr9

Deep beneath the sea, innovation is at work. Fredrik and the Shell engineering team worked with partners to develop the world’s deepest subsea compression system at Norway’s Ormen Lange gas field. With this innovation, the additional gas recovered could help heat 5 million European homes next year. Read more: https://go.shell.com/4r3dQm4
